tags.name: disco-conversation
tags.description: HTML-first conversation renderer. Child disco-message and optional disco-turn elements are the source of truth.

attributes.name: auto-scroll
attributes.description: Keep the viewport pinned to the bottom while content streams.

attributes.name: chat-width
attributes.description: Controls the maximum rendered conversation width.

tags.name: disco-turn
tags.description: Optional template-defined grouping element for one conversation turn.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the turn content is expanded.

tags.name: disco-step-group
tags.description: Expandable assistant step group rendered as the default centered step divider.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Uppercase divider label, for example 1 STEP or 4 STEPS.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the grouped step content is expanded.

tags.name: disco-message
tags.description: A single chat message with ordered child part elements.

attributes.name: replaces-message-id
attributes.description: Identifier of the message this message replaces.

attributes.name: replaced-by-message-id
attributes.description: Identifier of the message that replaced this message.

tags.name: disco-message-content
tags.description: Text content part. The element renders plain text or markdown depending on format.

tags.name: disco-generated-text
tags.description: Expandable generated prompt text associated with a user message.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label shown above expanded generated text.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the generated text content is expanded.

tags.name: disco-reasoning
tags.description: Reasoning/thinking part associated with an assistant message.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the expandable element content is expanded.

tags.name: disco-tool-call
tags.description: Dynamic tool call part with input and output children.

attributes.name: approval-id
attributes.description: Approval request identifier when state is approval-requested.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the expandable element content is expanded.

tags.name: disco-tool-input
tags.description: Tool input payload. Use child JSON script content for structured data.

tags.name: disco-tool-output
tags.description: Tool output payload. Use child JSON script content for structured data.

tags.name: disco-attachment
tags.description: File, image, source, or artifact attachment part.

tags.name: disco-browser-activity
tags.description: Browser activity captured during a conversation turn.

attributes.name: step-count
attributes.description: Number of browser steps represented by this activity.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the browser activity content is expanded.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the expandable element content is expanded.

tags.name: disco-metadata
tags.description: Structured JSON metadata associated with the nearest conversation, message, or part.
